ocr.text: The data presented in the table provides a comprehensive overview of the finishing quality assessments associated with MIGS-
31 properties. This analysis is critical for understanding the consistency and reliability of finished products within the specified
term.
MIGS ID  Property  Term
MIGS-31  Finishing quality  Finished
MIGS-28  Libraries used  Three libraries of 500 bp, 2,000 bp and 6,000 bp, respectively
MIGS-29  Sequencing platforms  Solexa
MIGS-31.2  Fold coverage  200 x
MIGS-30  Assemblers  SOAPdenovo 1.05
MIGS-32  Gene calling method  NCBI Prokaryotic Genome Annotation Pipeline
Locus Tag  PFLUOLIPICF7
Genbank ID  CP005975
GenBank Date of Release  May 31, 2017
GOLD ID  Gi0079402
BIOPROJECT  PRJNA203247
NCBI taxon ID  1334632
Project relevance  Plant-bacteria interaction, Model for endophytic lifestyle, Agricultural, Environmental
The MIGS ID column serves as a unique identifier for each property, ensuring precise tracking and reference throughout the
evaluation process. By examining the relationship between the MIGS ID and the associated finishing quality metrics,

stakeholders can gain valuable insights into production outcomes and potential areas for improvement.

Furthermore, the Term
column delineates the specific timeframe during which the finishing quality was assessed, allowing for a temporal analysis of
performance trends. This temporal dimension is essential for identifying whether certain properties consistently meet quality
standards or if there are fluctuations that may require further investigation. Overall, the integration of these metrics not only
enhances the understanding of finishing quality for MIGS-31 but also facilitates informed decision-making for quality control
and production optimization. Stakeholders are encouraged to utilize this data to support strategic initiatives aimed at
maintaining high-quality standards across all finished products.
